title: [Kconfig:61-67] LICHEN_LORA_FREQUENCY has no range constraint
description:
Category not checked: Build configuration validation

Bug found: CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_FREQUENCY has no 'range' constraint in Kconfig. Contrast with CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_TX_POWER which has 'range 0 22'.

Valid LoRa frequencies are hardware-constrained (typically 137-1020MHz for SX127x, 150-960MHz for SX126x). A user could configure 0 or 4GHz which would silently fail at runtime.

The comment says 'Must comply with regional regulations' but provides no compile-time bounds checking. At minimum, the common ISM bands should be constrained: range 137000000 1020000000 (broad) or tighter regional defaults.

Impact: P4 - Runtime failure with confusing error message instead of build-time validation.
close_reason: Fixed: Added range constraint 137-1020 MHz to LICHEN_LORA_FREQUENCY Kconfig
